operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: EU-UN Report: Gaza Needs $71.4B Over Decade, Human Development Set Back 77 Years; 5 Killed Apr 21; 780+ Dead Since Oct Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: Aid at only 37% of required levels; 72,556+ killed since Oct 7, 2023; Board of Peace envoy Mladenov 'fairly optimistic' on disarmament talks despite Hamas refusal; EU-UN assessment finds $35.2B infrastructure damage alone
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,556+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health, Apr 21 2026). 780+ killed since Oct 10, 2025 ceasefire framework (Gaza MoH Apr 21, 2026). 2,400+ ceasefire violations documented by Gaza GMO. ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803; first direct US-Hamas talks in Cairo (Apr 14-15, 2026) yielded no breakthrough; Hamas rejecting disarmament (Apr 2026). Board of Peace envoy Mladenov stated he is 'fairly optimistic' about reaching a disarmament arrangement (Apr 21, 2026). EU-UN Joint Recovery and Reconstruction Assessment (Apr 21, 2026): $71.4B needed over 10 years; $35.2B infrastructure damage; $26.3B needed in first 18 months; 371,888 housing units damaged/destroyed; human development set back 77 years. OCHA Apr 17 report: aid at 37% of required levels; ~102–122 trucks/day vs. 600+ needed. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. UNRWA SitRep: 571,000 in emergency hunger, 18,000 await medical evacuation. 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B req, only 9.7% funded. OHCHR (Apr 10): 589 aid workers and 294 Palestinian journalists killed since Oct 7, 2023.
